prompt:
Search docs/solutions/ for learnings relevant to a deterministic Rust Roman numeral converter/parser with canonical subtractive notation and strict parsing.

Return concise bullets of any past bugs, patterns, or best practices that should inform black-box test design and implementation. Do not inspect /tmp/foundry-pi-roman-numeral implementation files.

visible_context.label: feature_topic
visible_context.content: Rust Roman numeral converter/parser: to_roman(u16), from_roman(&str), canonical subtractive notation, strict invalid/non-canonical handling.
